    <item>
        <guid>nba529733</guid>
        <title>Deni Avdija: Adds 14 points in victory</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/deni-avdija-5152</link>
        <description>Avdija tallied 14 points (5-13 FG, 1-2 3Pt, 3-5 FT), four rebounds, three assists and one block across 30 minutes in Tuesday's 106-103 Game 2 win over the Spurs in the first round of the playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Tue, 21 Apr 2026 9:29:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529732</guid>
        <title>Stephon Castle: Scores 18 points in loss</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/stephon-castle-6250</link>
        <description>Castle chipped in 18 points (7-20 FG, 2-6 3Pt, 2-5 FT), seven rebounds, five assists, two steals and one block across 38 minutes in Tuesday's 106-103 Game 2 loss to the Trail Blazers in the first round of the playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Tue, 21 Apr 2026 9:21:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529730</guid>
        <title>Scoot Henderson: Paces Portland in win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/scoot-henderson-5377</link>
        <description>Henderson amassed 31 points (11-17 FG, 5-9 3Pt, 4-6 FT), one rebound, one steal and one block across 38 minutes in Tuesday's 106-103 Game 2 win over the Spurs in the first round of the playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Tue, 21 Apr 2026 8:19:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529729</guid>
        <title>Victor Wembanyama: Diagnosed with concussion</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/victor-wembanyama-5809</link>
        <description>Wembanyama has been diagnosed with a concussion and will undergo further testing Wednesday, Shams Charania of ESPN reports.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Tue, 21 Apr 2026 8:06:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529728</guid>
        <title>Devin Vassell: Double-doubles in defeat</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/devin-vassell-5113</link>
        <description>Vassell closed Tuesday's 106-103 Game 2 loss to the Trail Blazers with 16 points (6-16 FG, 0-5 3Pt, 4-5 FT), 12 rebounds, three steals, two assists and one block across 34 minutes.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Tue, 21 Apr 2026 7:57:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
